title: euphorbia schimperi
intro: Euphorbia schimperi, also known as the Somali spurge or spurge euphorbia, is a species of succulent plant native to the Horn of Africa and parts of the Arabian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia schimperi include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, the latex is used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
